violations.text: Meatballs were observed held at 104 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC Meatballs were in unit for 3 hours. Meatballs were disposed of. Unit was observed turned too low, PIC turned up unit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. PIC stated new menu will be printed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2026
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026
A utensil was observed stored behind a prep unit and a wall, Utensil relocated. PIC stated a hook would be purchased to store utensil on. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026
